sglang.title: Disable graceful shutdown of tokenizer manager when not in the main thread
sglang.author: comaniac
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fixes #1987
Error message:
add_signal_handler() can only be called from the main thread

The root cause is Ray Data async streamer uses a separate thread to run UDF (user defined function), so that SGLang engine is not located in the main thread anymore. In this case, due to the CPython l

sglang.title: Remove normalized_prompt_logprobs from the engine to make code easier to maintain
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: This PR removes normalized_prompt_logprobs from the engine because it is used rarely but makes the code much harder to maintain. Users can still compute this value by themselves with the return value input_logprobs

sglang.title: optimize custom allreduce kernel
sglang.author: yizhang2077
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

optimize custom allreduce
Modifications


support copy input mode
adapt vllm register cuda graph buffer to save a data copy from input tensor to ipc buffer
optimze some tensorrt llm kernel performance

correctness test
unittest: python3 tests/test_trt_reduce.py python3 test/srt/test_cust

vllm.title: Fix: cases with empty sparsity config
vllm.author: rahul-tuli
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #12044
This PR fixes a bug where the sparsity_config in the CompressedTensorsConfig class would not handle empty configurations correctly. The issue, tracked in #12044, arose due to the explicit check for None values instead of evaluating the truthiness of sparsity_config. The fix ensures that e

vllm.title: Type-fix: make execute_model output type optional
vllm.author: youngkent
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The output of worker.execute_model is depending on the rank. When rank >0, output is avoided, therefore making the output type Optional.

vllm.title: [Platform] Do not raise error if _Backend is not found
vllm.author: wangxiyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Part of #11162
The out-of-tree platform may have a different _Backend for attention backend. Ignore the error if the input _Backend is not the one in-tree.

vllm.title: Misc: allow to use proxy in `HTTPConnection`
vllm.author: zhouyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This patch fixes the HTTPConnection to work with proxy
Ref: https://docs.aiohttp.org/en/stable/client_advanced.html#proxy-support

vllm.title: [Bugfix] use right truncation for non-generative tasks
vllm.author: joerunde
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently the truncation_side kwarg is always unset when creating a tokenizer, so it defaults to left everywhere. This is correct for text generation, but unexpected for other tasks like embedding and score.
This PR sets the truncation side based on the current task, and only draft and generate will

vllm.title: [V1][Core] Autotune encoder cache budget
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR refactors the logic for multimodal encoder cache budget from hardcoded values to be autotuned from the underlying model & scheduler configurations.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix _get_lora_device for HQQ marlin
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Account for HQQ Marlin in _get_lora_device()
Bug: HQQ models with LoRA will raise ValueError(f"Unsupported base layer: {base_layer}") from here.
Fix:
hqq_marlin.py, registers the weights under the name "W_q". Look for attribute name "W_q" in  _get_lora_device() for HQQ marlin.
Testing:
#!/bin/bash
n

vllm.title: Allow hip sources to be directly included when compiling for rocm.
vllm.author: tvirolai-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
vLLM csrc contents are always hipified unless they are .cpp or .cc files. This causes issues when one wants to compile hip files:
If the file is named .cu then hipification either chokes on hip exclusive things or it skips it because there is nothing to hipify, meaning the .hip equivalent is not cre

vllm.title: [Core] Default to using per_token quantization for fp8 when cutlass is supported.
vllm.author: elfiegg
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Default to using per_token quantization for fp8 when cutlass is supported (so that dequantization will be fused with cutlass gemm kernel), which improves performance by enabling fusion of amax + quantization.
Tested with Llama2-7B on H100:
Before: Throughput: 152.60 requests/s, 10681.75 tokens/s.
Af
